requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (BOBS compulsory standard / BOS / IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（BOBS强制标准/BOS/IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（BOBS強制標準/BOS/IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Botswana market must meet electrical safety requirements based on IEC 60335-2-24, adopted by the Botswana Bureau of Standards (BOBS) as a Botswana Standard (BOS, typically adopting the IEC text directly, often via the SANS/SADC alignment route). The product-specific standard (Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers) is read with the general IEC 60335-1 (BOS 60335-1). Key requirements mirror the international IEC base: protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, thermal cut-outs, creepage and clearance distances, mechanical strength of the enclosure, earthing continuity, and appliance markings. Where the product falls under a BOBS compulsory specification, conformity is demonstrated through the BOBS conformity assessment / BOS import-inspection scheme and the BOS mark before the goods can clear and be sold. Grid supply is 230 V / 50 Hz, so appliance rating and plug/marking must suit 230 V （same 50 Hz as China; nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V).
summary.zh: 投放博茨瓦纳市场的家用制冷器具须满足基于IEC 60335-2-24的电气安全要求，该标准由博茨瓦纳标准局（BOBS）采纳为博茨瓦纳标准（BOS，通常直接采用IEC文本，常经SANS/SADC对齐途径）。产品专项标准（制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求）须与通用标准IEC 60335-1（BOS 60335-1）结合使用。核心要求与国际IEC基准一致：防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、热断路器、爬电距离与电气间隙、外壳机械强度、接地连续性及器具标识。若产品属于BOBS强制规范范围，则须通过BOBS合格评定/BOS进口检验制度证明符合性并取得BOS标志，货物方可放行并销售。电网供电为230 V/50 Hz，故器具额定值及插头/标识须适配230 V（与中国同为50 Hz；标称电压不同于中国220 V）。
summary.zht: 投放波札那市場的家用製冷器具須滿足基於IEC 60335-2-24的電氣安全要求，該標準由波札那標準局（BOBS）採納為波札那標準（BOS，通常直接採用IEC文本，常經SANS/SADC對齊途徑）。產品專項標準（製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求）須與通用標準IEC 60335-1（BOS 60335-1）結合使用。核心要求與國際IEC基準一致：防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、熱斷路器、爬電距離與電氣間隙、外殼機械強度、接地連續性及器具標識。若產品屬於BOBS強制規範範圍，則須通過BOBS合格評定/BOS進口檢驗制度證明符合性並取得BOS標誌，貨物方可放行並銷售。電網供電為230 V/50 Hz，故器具額定值及插頭/標識須適配230 V（與中國同為50 Hz；標稱電壓不同於中國220 V）。

standards_or_laws: BOS / IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (adopted by BOBS as a Botswana Standard)
BOS / IEC 60335-1 — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
Botswana Bureau of Standards (BOBS) — Standards Act / compulsory standards and BOS import-inspection and mark scheme

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with Chinese national deviations, read with GB 4706.1 (general requirements). It is mandatory and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated body before sale in China. Because both GB 4706.13 and the Botswana BOS standard descend from IEC 60335-2-24, the technical base is largely shared — but a CCC certificate is not automatically recognised by BOBS; conformity must be demonstrated through the Botswana scheme.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010并含中国国家偏差，须与GB 4706.1（通用要求）结合使用。该标准为强制性，由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度监督执行；产品须经CNCA指定机构完成CCC认证方可在华销售。由于GB 4706.13与博茨瓦纳BOS标准均源自IEC 60335-2-24，技术基础大体共通——但CCC证书不被BOBS自动认可，须通过博茨瓦纳制度证明符合性。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010並含中國國家偏差，須與GB 4706.1（通用要求）結合使用。該標準為強制性，由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度監督執行；產品須經CNCA指定機構完成CCC認證方可在華銷售。由於GB 4706.13與波札那BOS標準均源自IEC 60335-2-24，技術基礎大體共通——但CCC證書不被BOBS自動認可，須通過波札那制度證明符合性。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Because both China's GB 4706.13 and Botswana's BOS standard adopt IEC 60335-2-24, the engineering test base overlaps substantially — a shared IEC heritage can reduce re-testing, and an IECEE CB Scheme test report (IEC 60335-2-24 basis) from an IECEE NCB is often the most efficient route to satisfy BOBS. However, gaps remain: (1) Recognition — a Chinese CCC certificate referencing GB standards is not itself accepted; conformity must be shown via the BOBS conformity assessment / BOS import-inspection and mark scheme, typically using IEC/CB reports plus a BOS mark; (2) Voltage/marking — appliances must be rated and marked for 230 V 50 Hz; rating-plate, plug type, and instructions should suit the Botswana/SADC market; (3) National deviations — any China-specific deviations in GB 4706.13 (socket types, earthing, test conditions) cannot be assumed to satisfy the IEC text BOBS adopts without engineering review. Exporters should confirm the exact current BOS standard edition and whether the refrigerator falls under a BOBS compulsory specification with a qualified consultant.
gap.zh: 由于中国GB 4706.13与博茨瓦纳BOS标准均采用IEC 60335-2-24，工程检测基础大幅重叠——共同的IEC渊源可减少重新检测，由IECEE NCB出具的IECEE CB体系检测报告（基于IEC 60335-2-24）通常是满足BOBS最有效的途径。但仍存在差距：（1）认可——引用GB标准的中国CCC证书本身不被接受；须通过BOBS合格评定/BOS进口检验及标志制度证明符合性，通常采用IEC/CB报告加BOS标志；（2）电压/标识——器具须按230 V 50 Hz额定并标识；铭牌、插头类型及说明书应适配博茨瓦纳/SADC市场；（3）国家偏差——GB 4706.13中任何中国特有偏差（插座类型、接地、试验条件）在未经工程评审前不能默认满足BOBS采用的IEC文本。出口商应与合格顾问确认当前BOS标准的确切版本，以及该电冰箱是否属于BOBS强制规范范围。
gap.zht: 由於中國GB 4706.13與波札那BOS標準均採用IEC 60335-2-24，工程檢測基礎大幅重疊——共同的IEC淵源可減少重新檢測，由IECEE NCB出具的IECEE CB體系檢測報告（基於IEC 60335-2-24）通常是滿足BOBS最有效的途徑。但仍存在差距：（1）認可——引用GB標準的中國CCC證書本身不被接受；須通過BOBS合格評定/BOS進口檢驗及標誌制度證明符合性，通常採用IEC/CB報告加BOS標誌；（2）電壓/標識——器具須按230 V 50 Hz額定並標識；銘牌、插頭類型及說明書應適配波札那/SADC市場；（3）國家偏差——GB 4706.13中任何中國特有偏差（插座類型、接地、試驗條件）在未經工程評審前不能默認滿足BOBS採用的IEC文本。出口商應與合格顧問確認當前BOS標準的確切版本，以及該電冰箱是否屬於BOBS強制規範範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the product falls under a BOBS compulsory standard / BOS import-inspection and mark scheme — electrical safety to BOS/IEC 60335-2-24 must be demonstrated before clearance and sale
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety to BOS/IEC 60335-2-24 is required for the Botswana market, demonstrated through the BOBS conformity assessment / BOS import-inspection and mark scheme. Chinese CCC certification to GB 4706.13 is not automatically recognised, but the shared IEC 60335-2-24 base (ideally via an IECEE CB report) can substantially reduce re-testing. Confirm the current BOS edition, 230 V rating/marking, and whether the product is under a BOBS compulsory specification with a qualified consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 博茨瓦纳市场要求符合BOS/IEC 60335-2-24电气安全，通过BOBS合格评定/BOS进口检验及标志制度证明。中国依据GB 4706.13的CCC认证不被自动认可，但共同的IEC 60335-2-24基础（最好经IECEE CB报告）可大幅减少重新检测。请与合格顾问确认当前BOS版本、230 V额定/标识，以及产品是否属于BOBS强制规范范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 波札那市場要求符合BOS/IEC 60335-2-24電氣安全，通過BOBS合格評定/BOS進口檢驗及標誌制度證明。中國依據GB 4706.13的CCC認證不被自動認可，但共同的IEC 60335-2-24基礎（最好經IECEE CB報告）可大幅減少重新檢測。請與合格顧問確認當前BOS版本、230 V額定/標識，以及產品是否屬於BOBS強制規範範圍。
